title: Phymatodes gaudichaudii

The classification of Phymatodes gaudichaudii is as follows: it is a genus within the family Bignonaceae and is further classified into the order Lamiales and class Magnoliopsida. The plant is also known as the "Pacific Coral Vine" and is a member of the angiosperm clade. It is a relatively rare and unique species within its family.
